2026-03-14T10:19:24|groundnuty|comment|https://github.com/groundnuty/claude-plan-composer/issues/1#issuecomment-4060227133|Thanks for the NDJSON log evidence — this is conclusive. `TeamCreate` creates the coordination layer, `Agent` spawns the subprocesses that join it. Without `Agent`, `SendMessage` has no recipients.
